case_number: Criminal Jail Revision Application No.S-15 of 2023

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Jail Revision Application No.S-15 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 22.04.2025 Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani Assistant PG. -.-.-. This Criminal Jail Revision Application is pending since 2023. By Order dated 06.09.2023 a jail roll was called after that the matter has been fixed today wherein it is stated that the convict appellant has served his sentence and has been released on 20.04.2023. In light of jail roll along with letter of the Senior Superintendent Central Prison Hyderabad, since the appellant has served his sentence and has been released since last two years this Criminal Jail Revision Application No.S-15 of 2023 has become infructuous hence dismissed. J U D G E Ali Haider
